zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Ermingland於1404年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可斯迪福吉時，她的父親William Ermingland30歲，母親Agnes26歲。她於1430年之前與Richard Calthorpe結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1478年2月20日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Ermingland于1404年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可斯迪福吉时，她的父亲William Ermingland30岁，母亲Agnes26岁。她于1430年之前与Richard Calthorpe结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1478年2月20日在英国英格兰諾福爾可享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Ermingland was born in 1404, in Stiffkey, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Ermingland, was 30 and her mother, Agnes, was 26. She married Richard Calthorpe before 1430. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 20 February 1478, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Ermingland est née en 1404, à Stiffkey, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Ermingland, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Calthorpe avant 1430. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 février 1478, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Ermingland 1404 in Stiffkey, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Ermingland 30 und ihre Mutter Agnes 26. Sie hat vor 1430 Richard Calthorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 20. Februar 1478 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Ermingland è nata il nel 1404 nel Stiffkey, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Ermingland, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Agnes, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Richard Calthorpe prima del 1430. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 febbraio 1478, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Erminglandが1404年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクスティフケイで生まれた時，父William Erminglandは30歳，母Agnesは26歳であった。1430年以前にRichard Calthorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1478年2月20日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Ermingland(이)가 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 스티프케이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Ermingland(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1430년 이전 Richard Calthorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 2월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Ermingland nasceu em 1404, em Stiffkey, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Ermingland, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Calthorpe antes 1430. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1478, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Ermingland родилась в 1404 г. в местности стиффки, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Ermingland было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Calthorpe перед 1430 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 февраля 1478 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Ermingland nació en 1404, en Stiffkey, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Ermingland, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Richard Calthorpe antes de 1430. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1478, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años.
